query: how should I make the payment flow idempotent?

sections.title: Payments must be idempotent via the ledger key
sections.body: processPayment must pass the ledger idempotency key so retries dedupe. Verified by: npm test.

sections.title: Start at src/payments/process.ts
sections.body: processPayment is the only writer of ledger entries; every retry path funnels through it.
